# KAIJU zoo queue — ordered small→large. The kaiju-zoo-watcher drains this
# ONE BUILD AT A TIME across the TWO-STAGE dependency (IQ-ladder feeder → KAIJU
# encode), submitting at most one build per hourly tick on the first actionable
# model:
#   * READY (f16 GCS + imatrix R2 + base knot R2)     → submit KAIJU encode
#   * NOT READY + mapped HF source + not yet fed       → submit IQ-ladder feeder
# NOT-actionable models (HOLD / EXTERNAL / feeder-pending) are skipped and
# retried. Comments (#) and blank lines ignored. One model-id per line (must
# have monster-swarm/qspecs/<id>.qspec.json with a REAL argmax prompt_tokens +
# expect_token — see the reconciliation note at the bottom).
#
# The watcher's hf_source_of() decides feedability. Uncommenting a model here
# only lets the walk REACH it; whether it feeds depends on that map:
#   auto-feedable : tinyllama-1.1b deepseek-r1-1.5b llama-3.2-3b qwen3-4b
#                   gemma3-4b-it qwen3-8b
#   EXTERNAL      : mistral-7b   (mistral-iq-ladder-watcher owns the feeder)
#   HOLD (unmapped, needs a human): loki-8b-erotica, gemma4-12b-it,
#                   gemma4-31b-it, codestral-22b, 70B-class
#
# ── READY NOW (f16 cached on GCS) ──
qwen2.5-0.5b        # validation-size reference; f16 + imatrix + knot present → FIRST to fire
qwen2.5-7b          # kaiju1 SHIPPED + kaiju2 in flight → pre-seeded .done marker (watcher skips)

# ── AUTO-FEED then KAIJU (watcher submits IQ-ladder feeder, then encodes) ──
# small→large. Each is ADMITTED (production base knot) and argmax-gated; only
# the f16+imatrix feeder is missing, which the watcher now submits itself.
tinyllama-1.1b
deepseek-r1-1.5b
llama-3.2-3b
qwen3-4b
gemma3-4b-it
mistral-7b          # EXTERNAL feeder (mistral watcher, auto-following codestral); zoo only KAIJU-encodes once f16 lands
qwen3-8b

# ── HOLD — needs a human decision before enqueuing (watcher will skip if listed) ──
# loki-8b-erotica    # custom llama3-8b finetune — confirm HF safetensors source first
# gemma4-12b-it      # google/gemma-4-12B-it is GGUF; ladder needs safetensors → confirm convert path
# gemma4-31b-it      # same convert-path caveat + encode needs timeout/disk bump
# codestral-22b      # BLOCKED: (a) no dense .knot base (only OpenAI gateway) (b) NO real argmax qspec
#                    #   — its only qspec (codestral-22b-openai) is a gateway SENTINEL
#                    #   (prompt_tokens:[1], expect_token:1, knot:/dev/null), NOT an f16-argmax
#                    #   reproduction gate. Needs a dense base knot + an f16-derived gate first.
#
# ── BIG-DISK (do LAST; need diskSizeGb 400 + longer timeouts) ──
# llama-3.3-70b
# qwen2.5-72b
#
# ── OUT OF SCOPE for KAIJU argmax gate (non-text / SSM / gateway) ──
#   flux-1-schnell, ltx-video, unlimited-ocr, openai-gateway (no argmax token)
#   mamba-2.8b, falcon-mamba-7b, jamba-1.5-mini, rwkv7-2.9b (SSM/hybrid — KAIJU
#     encoder targets 2D attn/ffn matmuls; SSM layers need their own path)
#   qwen35moe-heretic (MoE expert-block slicing panics in the KAIJU serving arm)
#
# ── qspec reconciliation (2026-07-10) ──
# Verified against monster-swarm/qspecs/*: EVERY admitted dense transformer
# carries a REAL argmax qspec (prompt_tokens + a genuine f16 expect_token):
#   qwen2.5-0.5b(→paris 12095) qwen2.5-7b(→qwen25-7b 12095) qwen3-4b/8b(12095)
#   tinyllama-1.1b(3681) deepseek-r1-1.5b(12095) llama-3.2-3b(12366)
#   llama-3.3-70b(12366) loki-8b-erotica(12366) mistral-7b(6233)
#   gemma3-4b-it(9079) gemma4-12b-it(50429) gemma4-31b-it(9079) qwen2.5-72b(12095)
# EXCEPT codestral: its ONLY qspec is codestral-22b-openai (gateway SENTINEL
#   [1]→1, shape-identical to openai-gateway) — NOT gate-ready. SSM/image/gateway
#   qspecs (mamba/rwkv/jamba/falcon-mamba, flux/ltx/ocr, openai-gateway) are
#   out-of-scope by architecture, not by missing gate.
